title: Kanban board search options
excerpt: On a Kanban board in the Search bar is there a way to enter an OR option, i.e. search for value A or B?

posts.author: GlennC (Glenn Comiskey)
posts.cookedHtml: On a Kanban board in the Search bar is there a way to enter an OR option, i.e. search for value A or B?

posts.author: malia.monday (Malia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Glenn! This is currently not an available function in the Search Bar. That said, you should be able to use Advance Filters to accomplish this:

Screenshot 2024-07-17 at 2.43.26 PM1206×433 47.6 KB
